Format a bracketed metric-tag block for one entry row

Source: R/16_report_helpers.R
dot-format_metric_tag.Rd

[<metric_a>: 8; <metric_b>: 12] – one metric=value pair per metric column the entry has a non-NA value for, semicolon-separated, wrapped in square brackets. Returns the empty string when the row is missing all metric values (so the renderer can omit the tag entirely).

Usage

.format_metric_tag(row, metric_cols)

Developed by Abanoub J. Armanious.
